Our team growth is a crucial aspect of our strategic plan. As we navigate the path of scaling our impact, we envision expanding our core team to enhance our capabilities and reach. Our planned team growth will unfold in the following manner:
Timeline:
Depending on the funding we are able to secure, Over the next 12 to 18 months, we foresee a deliberate yet steady expansion of our team. This timeline aligns with our projected scaling milestones, ensuring that we have the necessary human resources to effectively manage increased operations and outreach.
Envisioned Team Size:
By the end of the timeline, we aim to increase our team size to between 10 and 15 employees (FET). This expansion will include strategic hires across key areas such as operations, marketing, and technology to fortify our organizational infrastructure.
Budget:
In light of the need for prudent financial planning, the budget allocation for our team's growth is crucial. We will earmark a portion of our anticipated funding for recruitment, onboarding, personnel development, website upgrades, and/or app development. The budget will be crafted with a focus on ensuring adequate salaries, professional development opportunities, and a conducive working environment to attract and retain top talent.
Furthermore, while our core team will see structured growth, we recognize the intrinsic value of occasional volunteers who contribute their time and skills. Volunteer engagement will continue to be an integral part of our organizational culture, fostering a sense of community and shared purpose.
Our team growth strategy is intricately woven into our broader expansion plans. We are mindful of the budgetary implications, and every new team member will play a vital role in propelling us toward our mission and vision.

column3: Our staff strength is 5. We currently support over 67 Small sanitation businesses to improve their toilet product sales and create market for their toilet businesses. We are currently providing market development services for SATO, a toilet product manufacturing company through our work with TBOs, we involved in strengthening sales distribution network for Sato Pan Toilets in Nigeria and also increasing brand visibility for the products in communities.  We are also working with UNICEF Nigeria to support sanitation marketing activities in 6 states
column4: As at today we are supporting 67 Toilet Business Owners to improve their business strategy through provision of business development support services
